ITM_UNLOCK_MESSAGE_0030.Text: <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1001>全数任务皆以阶级<DYN=RANK>以上完成

ITM_UNLOCK_MESSAGE_1100.Text: <GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1003>中将任一角色等级升到<DYN=VALUE>以上

ITM_UNLOCK_MESSAGE_1110.Text: 让<GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1003>的角色等级合计提升<DYN=VALUE>以上

ITM_UNLOCK_MESSAGE_3050.Text: 近距离攻击累计发动<DYN=VALUE>次

ITM_UNLOCK_MESSAGE_3060.Text: 远距离攻击累计发动<DYN=VALUE>次

ITM_UNLOCK_MESSAGE_3090.Text: 进行<DYN=VALUE>次降低对手能力的攻击

ITM_UNLOCK_MESSAGE_4050.Text: 达成上列条件即可在<GLO=GLS_GAME_WORDS_1007>购买。
